title: Rainbow Redstone
description: Make your redstone rainbow in pure vanilla! Optionally includes full customization in-game using respackopts mod.
body:
# Rainbow Redstone

This is a fully vanilla compatible resource pack for **any** version 1.13 and above, that makes the redstone dust rainbow (meaning you don't need *any* mods to use this!). It also offers full customization _in-game_ of many different aspects listed below, however this **requires** the [ResPackOpts](https://modrinth.com/mod/respackopts) mod. Other rainbow components are coming soon (hence this is currently in beta), check out the gallery to see how this currently looks like!

## Features:
- In-Game Customization of: ([ResPackOpts](https://modrinth.com/mod/respackopts) required)
  - Redstone dust type
  - Redstone dust distance off the surface
  - Signal strengh numbers
  - Redstone dust item type
- Full vanilla useability (without the customization)
- Compatibility with sodium and any other mods and resource packs

## Coming soon:
- Color customization
- Rainbow redstone components, including repeaters, comparators, torches, etc
- Animations for rainbow effects
- Changes for dust particles with the help of mods (or core shaders potentially)
---

### Important: if you want in-game customization, please install the [ResPackOpts](https://modrinth.com/mod/respackopts) mod along side this resource pack. I also highly recommend you do this anyways if you're already using a fabric/neoforge modpack.

---


<details>
<summary>A word about the history and future of this resource pack</summary>

The main goal of this resource pack initially was to just make rainbow redstone possible in Vanilla minecraft, which at the time I thought was impossible until I discovered and learned how [TCTC Cherry](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/tctc-cherry) does it. After that and making the very first alpha version of RR (Rainbow Redstone), I realized that I wanted this to go so much further than simply rainbow dust. Polishing the versions, I decided to add customization and it kinda went downhill from there. I am now planning on making this *the most* customizeable redstone dust in any pack ever, including color, shape, and so much more. I'm hoping ya'll enjoy it and are as excited as I am to the future this potentially holds! :3

</details>



---

Inspiration and inital code/files for blockstate and models for the dust were taken from [TCTC Cherry](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/tctc-cherry), altho have been heavily modified to suit my needs.

**License:** [CC BY-NC-SA 4.0](https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-nc-sa/4.0/deed.en)

---

Generative AI was not and is not used in the making of this resource pack.
